resources.string: Wait for the current data operation to finish.
Stop the current agent before removing this folder.
Stop the current agent before starting another chat.
Stop the current agent before opening another chat.
Stop the current agent before deleting this chat.
Stop the current agent before deleting this project.
Stop the current agent before moving this chat.
Stop the current agent before archiving this chat.
Stop the current agent before importing a backup.
Wait for this chat to finish opening.
Wait for the current turn before sending a photo.
Select a model first.
Unknown provider: %1$s
Could not link folder: %1$s
Could not remove folder access: %1$s
This chat is no longer available.
Could not create project: %1$s
Could not remove project: %1$s
Too many reports were sent from this network. Try again later.
Reporting is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
Reporting is temporarily unavailable. Check your connection and try again.
Codex sign-in failed: %1$s
Export failed: %1$s
Import failed: %1$s
The turn stopped unexpectedly: %1$s Review workspace changes before retrying.
Provider configuration could not be loaded
Custom provider could not be saved
Custom provider could not be removed
MCP configuration could not be saved
. Some changes could not be restored.
Folder linked
Folder access removed
Folder access removed. Workspace files moved to %1$s.
Project linked
Android could not keep this work active in the background: %1$s
service unavailable
Signed in with ChatGPT - pick a ChatGPT model from the model menu
Signed in as @%1$s
Backup exported
Restored %1$d file(s)
No connection - check your internet and try again.
The request timed out - the provider may be slow or your connection unstable.
Connection lost - check your internet and try again.
The provider rejected your API key - check it in Settings > Providers.
Rate limited by the provider - wait a moment and try again.
The provider temporarily blocked this request - wait a few minutes and try again.
The provider is overloaded right now - try again shortly.
Your ChatGPT sign-in expired. Sign in again in Settings > Providers.
The provider rejected your API key. Check it in Settings > Providers.
The provider is rate limiting requests.%1$s
OpenCode Go usage limit reached.%1$s You can enable Zen balance fallback in the OpenCode console.
The provider usage limit has been reached.%1$s
The provider is unavailable right now.%1$s
The provider returned an unreadable response. Try again or switch models.
" Try again in %1$s."
The previous turn stopped unexpectedly. Review any file changes before retrying.
Project removed. Chats moved to Unsorted; workspace files moved to %1$s.
Project removed. Chats moved to Unsorted.
Skill could not be updated
Skill could not be deleted
Server name is required
Skills
Approval required
Depends on action
Read only
GitHub sign-in failed: %1$s
Sign in with ChatGPT in Settings to use Codex.
Set an API key for %1$s in Settings.
Sign in with ChatGPT again in Settings.
Queued messages were not sent.
Interrupted before PhoneCode recorded the result. Review workspace changes before retrying.
